'''R2-V0''' was a [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] with purple adornments. R2-V0 was owned by the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Ixsthmus]], a captain of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The droid served the [[Green squad]] of the [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]], a team of the Alliance, and was stationed aboard Ixsthmus's ship, the ''[[Long Shot]]''.

The unit was disassembled over fifty times by the ship's co-pilot, [[Siene Symm]]. This was to repair the continuous stream of nonsense that came from the units' [[Actuator/Legends|actuator]]. Symm was unable to repair it, because the sounds were not a result of a defect. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was considered a [[Poet/Legends|poet]] and was said to create sounds because they sound nice together.
